concept: Create a turn-based strategy game where units don't move on a grid but instead rotate around pivot points on the battlefield. Strategic positioning involves both the placement of pivot fixtures and deciding which units to attach to each pivot system. Combat resolves when rotating units collide, with damage calculated based on relative momentum and unit type advantages. The battlefield dynamically changes as pivots can be destroyed, created, or have their rotation speed and direction altered by special abilities. Your faction is defending against invaders using an ancient technology based on celestial mechanics that mirrors the movement of planets and stars.
